fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning + RAG.reponse_attendue: option 1: RSRPmeas < ThreshServingOffloadWLAN, LowP and ChannelUtilizationWLAN < ThreshChUtilWLAN, Low
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning + RAG.reponse_predite:
option 4: The UE is connected to WLAN and the UE is not connected to E-UTRAN.
Explication: For traffic steering from E-UTRAN to WLAN, the UE must be connected to WLAN and not connected to E-UTRAN.

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning + RAG.question: What are the components of the Charging Trigger Function (CTF)? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning + RAG.reponse_attendue: option 1: Accounting Metrics Collection and Accounting Data Forwarding
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning + RAG.reponse_predite:
option 1: AMC, CTF, and CHF
Explication: The Charging Trigger Function (CTF) consists of the Accounting Metrics Collection (AMC) function block, the CTF function block, and the CHF function block.

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning + RAG.question: What does the NAS-SM support in the control plane between the UE and the SMF? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning + RAG.reponse_attendue: option 1: Handling of Session Management between the UE and the SMF
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning + RAG.reponse_predite:
option 3: NAS-SM support for the control plane between the UE and the SMF
Explication: The NAS-SM supports the control plane between the UE and the SMF, allowing for communication and control between the UE and the SMF.
